styles.label: Brutalist
styles.notes: Raw concrete geometry, exposed structural grid, anti-decoration, monumental type, zero border-radius, visible construction. Think Barbican Centre meets a CLI. Harsh, honest, unapologetically structural.

passVariants.direction: Monolithic slab layout. Everything is a heavy concrete block with raw paper textures and harsh black ink borders. Navigation is a vertical stack of oversized labels set in enormous display-weight headings crushed against tight body text. Color is almost absent apart from one explosive red accent on interactive elements.

buttonHover.prompt: Instant color snap with zero transition duration — brutal and immediate

buttonClick.prompt: Border doubles in weight on click then snaps back

cardHover.prompt: Full color inversion on hover — black becomes white, white becomes black

pageTransition.prompt: Zero transition — views slam into place with no easing

scrollReveal.prompt: No scroll animations; content is always visible and static

navItemHover.prompt: A heavy 4px underline appears instantly

navItemActive.prompt: Active nav item gets full background fill inverting text color

inputFocus.prompt: Border triples in weight on focus

toggleSwitch.prompt: Toggle snaps between states with zero easing

tooltips.prompt: Square tooltip with heavy border appears instantly

loadingState.prompt: Thick segmented progress bar with visible percentage

microFeedback.prompt: A stamped CONFIRMED label appears briefly

viewHints.dashboard: Oversized stat cards in a 2x2 grid with enormous numbers and minimal labels. No charts — just raw figures.
viewHints.projects: Vertical list with heavy horizontal rules. Project names in display weight. Status shown as colored block markers.
viewHints.project-workspace: Split-pane with thick draggable divider. Left panel is file tree, right is content slab.
viewHints.kanban: Vertical columns with heavy black column headers and white cards separated by thick rules.
viewHints.whiteboard: Free canvas with a visible dot-grid background. Nodes are raw rectangles with no border-radius.
viewHints.schema-planner: Table-based schema view with monospace field names and type badges in bordered boxes.
viewHints.directory-tree: Indented tree with connecting lines made from CSS borders. Folders are bold, files are regular weight.
viewHints.ideas: Card grid with 3 columns. Each card is a stark white rectangle with black border and oversized title.
viewHints.ai-chat: Terminal-style chat with monospace font. User messages prefixed with '>' and AI responses in a different background.
viewHints.settings: Single long scroll form with section headers in display font and heavy horizontal rules between groups.

passVariants.direction: Poster/manifesto grid layout. The app feels like a printed broadsheet with stamps, seals, and grid lines visible. Navigation uses numbered stamps and badges. Content is arranged in irregular newspaper columns with pull-quotes and oversized indexing numbers. Heavy use of borders, rules, and monospace labeling throughout.

buttonHover.prompt: Underline slides in from the left like a typographic rule being drawn

buttonClick.prompt: Button scales down 2% and border thickens as if being rubber-stamped

cardHover.prompt: Only corner brackets appear on hover, like crop marks on a proof sheet

pageTransition.prompt: New page slides up from below as if a new broadsheet is being stacked on top

scrollReveal.prompt: Text appears character by character as if being typeset

navItemHover.prompt: The index number beside the nav item gains a circle border

navItemActive.prompt: Active item shows a filled rectangular badge behind the text

inputFocus.prompt: Border changes from solid to animated marching-ants dotted pattern

toggleSwitch.prompt: Toggle renders as a checkbox that gets a visible stamp mark

tooltips.prompt: Tooltip appears as a numbered footnote annotation

loadingState.prompt: Loading shown as dot leaders filling a line like a table of contents

microFeedback.prompt: A circular APPROVED stamp appears and fades

viewHints.dashboard: Newspaper broadsheet layout with headline stats, pull-quote metrics, and multi-column text blocks with indexing numbers.
viewHints.projects: Manifest ledger with numbered rows, stamp-style status indicators, and date columns in monospace.
viewHints.project-workspace: Multi-column newspaper layout with a sidebar margin for annotations and reference numbers.
viewHints.kanban: Horizontal swimlanes styled as classified-ad rows with stamp-badge priority markers.
viewHints.whiteboard: Mood board collage layout with overlapping cards at slight rotations and pin markers.
viewHints.schema-planner: Blueprint spec sheet with numbered fields, cross-reference indices, and measurement annotations.
viewHints.directory-tree: Table-of-contents layout with dot leaders connecting names to metadata on the right.
viewHints.ideas: Timeline layout with dated entries along a vertical rule, pull-quotes for key ideas, and index numbers.
viewHints.ai-chat: Letter/memo format where each message is a formal memo with TO/FROM/SUBJECT headers and a stamped date.
viewHints.settings: Control panel with labeled switches arranged in a grid, each with a numbered reference code.

antiRepeat: Pass 1 used monolithic slab blocks with a vertical nav stack — avoid that layout
Pass 1 used a 2x2 stat-card dashboard — use a newspaper column layout instead
Pass 1 used terminal-style chat — use memo format instead
Pass 1 used paper+red palette — use cool gray+electric blue instead

passVariants.direction: Full terminal/CLI aesthetic. The entire UI looks like a command-line interface running in a retro CRT monitor. Black background with phosphor-green text, scanline overlay, and blinking cursors everywhere. Navigation is driven by keyboard shortcuts displayed prominently. No hover transitions — interaction is keyboard-first with typed commands.

buttonHover.prompt: No hover effects — this is a keyboard-driven interface

buttonClick.prompt: A brief green outline flash confirms activation, like a terminal command executing

cardHover.prompt: A blinking cursor appears at the start of the focused card row

pageTransition.prompt: Screen clears top-to-bottom then redraws content line by line

scrollReveal.prompt: Content appears one line at a time as if being printed to stdout

navItemHover.prompt: No mouse hover — keyboard shortcut labels are always visible

navItemActive.prompt: Active item is prefixed with a > arrow character

inputFocus.prompt: Input shows a blinking block cursor and a $ prompt prefix

toggleSwitch.prompt: Toggle displays as [ON]/[OFF] text that swaps on activation

tooltips.prompt: Tooltip appears as a man-page style help block with monospace text

loadingState.prompt: Loading shown as rotating ASCII characters: | / - \

idleAmbient.prompt: Subtle CRT scanline overlay with occasional micro-flicker

microFeedback.prompt: A brief [OK] or [DONE] message prints and fades

viewHints.dashboard: Metric gauges rendered as ASCII bar charts and sparklines. Stats displayed as key=value pairs in a monospace table.
viewHints.projects: File-listing format like ls -la output with columns for name, status, date, and size.
viewHints.project-workspace: Tmux-style split panes with visible border characters. Top pane for content, bottom for a command prompt.
viewHints.kanban: Priority matrix in a 2x2 ASCII table grid. Tasks are single-line entries with status codes.
viewHints.whiteboard: Flowchart rendered with box-drawing characters and ASCII arrows connecting nodes.
viewHints.schema-planner: CREATE TABLE style SQL display with typed columns and constraint annotations.
viewHints.directory-tree: tree command output with box-drawing characters for branch connectors.
viewHints.ideas: Numbered list view like search results with title, one-line summary, and metadata tags.
viewHints.ai-chat: Terminal REPL style. User input after a $ prompt, AI response prefixed with =>. No bubbles.
viewHints.settings: INI-file style config with [SECTION] headers and key=value pairs, toggled by typing values.

antiRepeat: Pass 1 used paper+red palette on light background — use black+green CRT aesthetic instead
Pass 1 used Anton display headings — use monospace for everything instead
Pass 2 used newspaper/manifesto layout with stamps — use terminal/CLI layout instead
Pass 2 used memo-format chat — use REPL terminal chat instead
Pass 2 used swimlane kanban — use priority matrix instead

passVariants.direction: Construction-zone blueprint aesthetic. The UI looks like architectural blueprints and construction site signage. Navy blue background with white grid lines, safety orange for warnings and accents, and stencil-style typography. Grid-paper patterns, caution-stripe dividers, and measurement annotations. Everything feels like it is still being built — construction barriers, warning tape, and scaffolding metaphors.

buttonHover.prompt: Safety-orange fill expands from center outward on hover

buttonClick.prompt: Button sinks into the blueprint surface losing its raised shadow

cardHover.prompt: A dashed construction outline appears around the card like a measurement annotation

pageTransition.prompt: New page unfolds like a blueprint being spread on a table

scrollReveal.prompt: Content fades in and snaps to the visible grid lines

navItemHover.prompt: A diagonal caution-stripe pattern appears as an underline

navItemActive.prompt: Active item gets a safety-orange circular badge

inputFocus.prompt: Focus shows dimension lines with arrow endpoints on top and bottom of the field

toggleSwitch.prompt: Toggle styled as a construction lever that slides horizontally with a mechanical feel

tooltips.prompt: Tooltip appears connected by a thin annotation line with a measurement-style callout box

loadingState.prompt: Loading shown as a pulsing caution-stripe barrier bar

idleAmbient.prompt: Background grid lines pulse very subtly to suggest an active blueprint

microFeedback.prompt: An orange checkmark with APPROVED stamp appears briefly

viewHints.dashboard: Data tables with measurement-style headers and blueprint grid background. Stat values shown in large stencil type with unit annotations.
viewHints.projects: Gantt-chart-inspired timeline strips with project phases shown as colored bars on a grid.
viewHints.project-workspace: Blueprint drafting table layout with a main drawing area and a dimension sidebar for metadata.
viewHints.kanban: Card grid arranged on blueprint graph paper with zone labels and section markings.
viewHints.whiteboard: Technical drawing canvas with ruler edges, protractor-angle guides, and snap-to-grid nodes.
viewHints.schema-planner: Wiring-diagram style with fields as terminal blocks connected by traced wire paths.
viewHints.directory-tree: Site-plan hierarchy with indented entries styled as blueprint room labels with reference numbers.
viewHints.ideas: Bubble chart where each idea is a circle sized by importance, plotted on a grid with axis labels.
viewHints.ai-chat: Radio-dispatch format with callsign headers, timestamp annotations, and message blocks in stencil monospace.
viewHints.settings: Wizard/step-through format with numbered construction phases, each step a blueprint section.

antiRepeat: Pass 1 used light paper background with red accent — use dark navy blueprint with orange instead
Pass 2 used newspaper manifesto columns — use blueprint grid layout instead
Pass 3 used black terminal with green text — use navy blueprint with white grid instead
Pass 3 used ASCII charts and CLI formatting — use blueprint annotations instead
Pass 2 used memo-format chat and pass 3 used REPL chat — use radio-dispatch format instead

styles.label: Mid-Century Modern
styles.notes: Organic curves meeting geometric precision, warm teak/walnut tones, Eames-era furniture logic applied to UI. Hairpin-leg tables become nav rails. Sunburst clocks become loading spinners. Clean but warm, never cold.

passVariants.direction: Furniture-logic layout. The workspace feels like sitting in an Eames lounge chair looking at a teak credenza. Rounded-rectangle panels with subtle wood-grain CSS textures. Navigation is a horizontal mid-century credenza shelf with icon-and-label items. Warm amber and olive accents with generous whitespace and organic curves on cards.

buttonHover.prompt: Button fills with warm amber from the bottom up like pouring teak stain

buttonClick.prompt: Button presses in with a deeper shadow as if pushing into a cushion

cardHover.prompt: Card lifts with deepening shadow like a teak tray being picked up

pageTransition.prompt: Smooth crossfade between views like turning pages in a design book

scrollReveal.prompt: Content elements fade up one after another like objects being placed on a shelf

navItemHover.prompt: An amber underline grows from center outward

navItemActive.prompt: Active item gets a warm wood-toned highlight bar behind it

inputFocus.prompt: Border transitions to warm amber on focus

toggleSwitch.prompt: Toggle thumb slides smoothly with a slight overshoot bounce

tooltips.prompt: Rounded-corner tooltip fades in with warm background

loadingState.prompt: Loading shown as a spinning sunburst clock motif

microFeedback.prompt: A warm amber checkmark draws itself on success

viewHints.dashboard: Stat cards in rounded rectangles with warm tones, arranged on a shelf-like horizontal layout. Radial charts with sunburst styling.
viewHints.projects: Card grid with rounded corners and subtle wood-grain texture. Each card has a small colored accent bar on top.
viewHints.project-workspace: Credenza-panel layout with a horizontal nav shelf and tabbed content area below.
viewHints.kanban: Vertical columns with rounded headers and cards that have generous padding and organic shapes.
viewHints.whiteboard: Mind map layout with organic curved connectors and rounded node shapes in warm tones.
viewHints.schema-planner: Card-based schema with each entity as a rounded panel connected by curved relationship lines.
viewHints.directory-tree: Bookshelf metaphor with folders as shelf sections and files as book spines.
viewHints.ideas: Pinterest masonry grid with varied-height cards featuring warm photography-style color accents.
viewHints.ai-chat: Chat bubbles with generous border-radius, warm tones for AI responses, and cream for user messages.
viewHints.settings: Tabbed form with warm tab indicators and organized sections with generous spacing.

passVariants.direction: Pedestal/tulip-table layout. A central hub radiates outward like Saarinen's tulip table. Navigation orbits the center. Content panels have tapered bases with subtle CSS borders that thin toward the bottom. Atomic-age starburst decorative elements serve as section dividers. Color palette leans into bold mustard, burnt orange, and cream.

buttonHover.prompt: Button scales up 3% and shadow expands as if rising off the tulip pedestal

buttonClick.prompt: Button scales down to 97% and snaps back with elastic easing

cardHover.prompt: Shadow extends downward and tapers like a tulip table pedestal

pageTransition.prompt: New view expands radially from the center like petals opening

scrollReveal.prompt: Content scales up from a central point as if growing from a stem

navItemHover.prompt: A subtle circular highlight orbits around the nav item

navItemActive.prompt: Active item gets an atomic starburst shape behind it

inputFocus.prompt: Warm mustard glow appears around focused inputs

toggleSwitch.prompt: Toggle animates like turning a mid-century dial knob

tooltips.prompt: Tooltip scales up from its trigger point

loadingState.prompt: Loading shown as a rotating atomic starburst motif

microFeedback.prompt: A small starburst pops and fades on successful action

viewHints.dashboard: Radial/hub layout with a central summary card and satellite metric cards orbiting around it. Starburst dividers between sections.
viewHints.projects: Timeline strip with projects as nodes along a horizontal line, connected by tapered connectors.
viewHints.project-workspace: Central content area with radiating tool panels that expand/collapse from the center.
viewHints.kanban: Horizontal swimlanes with tapered lane headers and starburst priority markers.
viewHints.whiteboard: Free canvas with atomic-orbit-style connectors between nodes and starburst junction points.
viewHints.schema-planner: Hub-spoke diagram with a central entity and related fields radiating outward.
viewHints.directory-tree: Sunburst/radial tree visualization where depth levels form concentric arcs.
viewHints.ideas: Bubble chart with varying-size circles for ideas, positioned by relevance/priority axes.
viewHints.ai-chat: Comic panel layout with alternating speech bubbles in mustard (AI) and cream (user) with starburst emphasis marks.
viewHints.settings: Single scroll with starburst section dividers and grouped controls in rounded panels.

antiRepeat: Pass 1 used horizontal credenza shelf navigation — use orbital/radial navigation instead
Pass 1 used Pinterest masonry for ideas — use bubble chart instead
Pass 1 used mind map whiteboard — use free canvas with atomic connectors instead
Pass 1 used warm amber+olive palette — use mustard+burnt orange instead

passVariants.direction: Alexander Girard textile-inspired design. The UI is a vibrant collage of geometric patterns, bold colors, and folk-art-inspired decoration. Multiple accent colors used simultaneously — coral, olive, gold, and teal all competing for attention on an ivory canvas. Pattern-heavy with geometric SVG repeating backgrounds, collage-like overlapping content blocks, and hand-crafted decorative borders.

buttonHover.prompt: A geometric pattern fills the button background on hover like a Girard textile swatch

buttonClick.prompt: Tiny geometric shapes burst outward from the button on click

cardHover.prompt: Card border cycles through coral-olive-gold-teal on hover

pageTransition.prompt: Content blocks shuffle and rearrange like collage pieces being reorganized

scrollReveal.prompt: Elements appear with slight random rotation as if being pasted into a collage

navItemHover.prompt: A colored geometric shape appears beside the nav item

navItemActive.prompt: Active item gets bolder and a decorative geometric border below

inputFocus.prompt: Focus border becomes a repeating geometric pattern

toggleSwitch.prompt: Toggle thumb morphs between a circle and a triangle between states

tooltips.prompt: Tooltip has a geometric pattern background with contrasting text

loadingState.prompt: Loading shown as a rotating kaleidoscope of geometric shapes

idleAmbient.prompt: Background geometric patterns drift very slowly

microFeedback.prompt: A geometric star shape pops and dissolves on success

viewHints.dashboard: Collage layout with overlapping stat cards at slight angles, each with a different geometric pattern border and accent color.
viewHints.projects: Gallery wall layout with project cards displayed like framed artworks in an irregular salon-style hanging.
viewHints.project-workspace: Patchwork quilt layout with content sections as textile patches with decorative seam borders.
viewHints.kanban: Card grid with color-coded category backgrounds and geometric shape status markers instead of text labels.
viewHints.whiteboard: Mood board with overlapping elements, textile pattern swatches, and folk-art decorative connectors.
viewHints.schema-planner: Colorful diagram with each entity in a different accent color and geometric shape for its type badge.
viewHints.directory-tree: Illustrated tree with decorative folk-art leaf and branch motifs alongside functional labels.
viewHints.ideas: Card grid with each card featuring a unique geometric pattern header strip and bold serif title.
viewHints.ai-chat: Illustrated letter format with decorative borders, colored initials at the start of each message, and ornamental dividers.
viewHints.settings: Wizard steps presented as a train of connected geometric carriages, each step a decorated panel.

antiRepeat: Pass 1 used restrained warm palette with amber and olive — use vibrant multicolor with coral, olive, gold, teal simultaneously
Pass 1 used shelf-like dashboard — use overlapping collage layout instead
Pass 2 used hub-spoke radial layouts — use irregular collage grid instead
Pass 2 used bubble chart for ideas — use patterned card grid instead
Pass 2 used comic panel chat — use illustrated letter format instead

passVariants.direction: Noguchi sculpture garden aesthetic. The UI breathes with asymmetric balance, enormous negative space, and sculptural simplicity. Misty sage and warm stone tones create a serene, contemplative atmosphere. Content is sparse but precisely placed — every element has room to exist. Paper-like textures, organic asymmetric shapes, and a Japanese-influenced sense of ma (the beauty of empty space).

buttonHover.prompt: Button opacity shifts delicately on hover — barely perceptible but intentional

buttonClick.prompt: Button sinks into the surface with a slow, weighted easing curve

cardHover.prompt: Shadow becomes softer and more diffuse, creating a floating-sculpture effect

pageTransition.prompt: Views fade through white paper, like turning a page in a gallery catalog

scrollReveal.prompt: Content rises slowly with opacity increasing, like sculptures emerging from fog

navItemHover.prompt: A thin sage-colored line extends from the nav item

navItemActive.prompt: Active item has a small circular dot indicator, like a gallery number

inputFocus.prompt: Border transitions to sage color with a slow, elegant fade

toggleSwitch.prompt: Toggle slides with slow, deliberate motion and no bounce

tooltips.prompt: Tooltip fades in slowly with small, light text like a gallery placard

loadingState.prompt: Loading shown as a slow concentric ripple like a stone dropped in still water

microFeedback.prompt: A soft sage confirmation gently appears and dissolves

viewHints.dashboard: Sparse sculptural layout with only 3-4 key metrics shown in large, elegant typography surrounded by generous whitespace.
viewHints.projects: Vertical scroll with each project as a full-width section separated by enormous negative space and thin rules.
viewHints.project-workspace: Asymmetric two-panel layout with content offset from center, leaving one side mostly empty.
viewHints.kanban: Vertical columns with extreme spacing — few cards visible at once, each given room to breathe.
viewHints.whiteboard: Zen garden canvas with minimal nodes placed asymmetrically, connected by thin stone-colored lines.
viewHints.schema-planner: Clean diagram with fields arranged in sculptural asymmetric balance, thin connecting lines, minimal labels.
viewHints.directory-tree: Sparse indented tree with generous line-height and thin connecting rules in stone color.
viewHints.ideas: List view with one idea per large row, title in display serif and a single line of description. Maximum breathing room.
viewHints.ai-chat: Gallery catalog format with messages as exhibition text — generous margins, small elegant type, lots of paper showing.
viewHints.settings: Single scroll with sections separated by vast whitespace. Controls are minimal and precisely placed.

antiRepeat: Pass 1 used dense credenza shelf layout — use extreme negative space and sparse placement instead
Pass 2 used radial hub-spoke layout — use asymmetric offset layout instead
Pass 3 used vibrant multicolor collage with patterns — use monochrome sage/stone with no patterns instead
Pass 3 used overlapping collage cards — use isolated elements with maximum whitespace instead
Pass 3 used wizard-step settings — use sparse single-scroll settings instead

styles.label: Retro 50s Aesthetic
styles.notes: Chrome diner meets atomic age. Pastel palette (mint, pink, baby blue), googie architecture curves, jukebox chrome accents, checkerboard patterns, neon sign energy. Optimistic, kitschy, fun.

passVariants.direction: Diner-booth layout. The app is a chrome-trimmed diner. Navigation is a jukebox selector with flip-card buttons. Content panels have rounded chrome bezels and checkerboard accents. Pastel pink, mint, and cream dominate. Neon-glow hover effects on interactive elements. Each view channel its own retro illustration vibe — dashboard is a speedometer, kanban is a drive-in menu board.

buttonHover.prompt: Button gains a neon pink glow on hover like a diner sign flickering on

buttonClick.prompt: Chrome highlight flash across the button surface on click

cardHover.prompt: Card lifts and tilts slightly in 3D as if being picked up from a countertop

pageTransition.prompt: Views flip like a jukebox track selector changing songs

scrollReveal.prompt: Content bounces in with playful elastic easing

navItemHover.prompt: Glowing neon underline appears under nav items

navItemActive.prompt: Active item gets a chrome-highlighted badge

inputFocus.prompt: Input border glows neon pink on focus

toggleSwitch.prompt: Toggle flips like a jukebox selection lever

tooltips.prompt: Tooltip appears as a retro comic speech bubble

loadingState.prompt: Loading shown as a spinning vinyl record

idleAmbient.prompt: Subtle neon sign flicker on accent elements

microFeedback.prompt: A small diner bell icon rings on success

viewHints.dashboard: Speedometer-style radial gauges for key metrics, chrome bezels around stat cards, checkerboard background pattern.
viewHints.projects: Jukebox selection list with each project as a track with chrome trim and pink/mint accents.
viewHints.project-workspace: Diner-booth split layout with chrome dividers and rounded panel corners.
viewHints.kanban: Drive-in menu board columns with marquee-style column headers and ticket-style cards.
viewHints.whiteboard: Free canvas with diner-napkin aesthetic — sketch-style elements on a cream background.
viewHints.schema-planner: Recipe-card style schema with each entity as a pastel-colored recipe card.
viewHints.directory-tree: Menu-board tree with neon-highlighted folder names and indented items like menu sub-items.
viewHints.ideas: Card grid styled as diner placemats with rounded corners, chrome accents, and playful colors.
viewHints.ai-chat: Chat bubbles shaped like diner speech bubbles — pink for AI, mint for user, with chrome outlines.
viewHints.settings: Tabbed form styled as a jukebox control panel with chrome-bezeled tab buttons.

passVariants.direction: Googie/space-age layout. Think Jetsons meets LAX Theme Building. Boomerang and parabola shapes in navigation and panel borders. Starburst dividers and atomic orbit decorative elements. Navigation is a swooping top bar with angled tabs. Color leans into turquoise, coral, and navy. Subtle starfield background using CSS radial gradients.

buttonHover.prompt: An atomic orbit ring animates around the button on hover

buttonClick.prompt: A small rocket exhaust effect shoots downward from the button on click

cardHover.prompt: Card tilts in 3D following the cursor like a floating satellite panel

pageTransition.prompt: New view swooshes in along a parabolic arc from the upper corner

scrollReveal.prompt: Content zooms in from far away as if approaching from outer space

navItemHover.prompt: Nav item bounces up in scale like a boomerang springing

navItemActive.prompt: Active item gets a boomerang-shaped underline in turquoise

inputFocus.prompt: Turquoise atomic ring glows around focused input

toggleSwitch.prompt: Toggle thumb rotates slightly as it slides, like a planet orbiting

tooltips.prompt: Tooltip appears in a capsule shape with a tail pointing to the trigger

loadingState.prompt: Loading shown as a small dot orbiting an atom-like path

idleAmbient.prompt: Background starfield dots drift slowly across the surface

microFeedback.prompt: An atomic starburst pops on successful action

viewHints.dashboard: Mission-control panel with parabola-shaped stat panels and atomic orbit decorations between metrics.
viewHints.projects: Rocket-launch timeline with projects as milestones along an upward trajectory line.
viewHints.project-workspace: Space-station module layout with swooping top navigation bar and angled content panels.
viewHints.kanban: Horizontal swimlanes with boomerang-shaped lane headers and starburst priority badges.
viewHints.whiteboard: Googie signpost canvas with boomerang connectors and starburst junction markers.
viewHints.schema-planner: Atomic model diagram with fields as electrons orbiting a central entity nucleus.
viewHints.directory-tree: Antenna/tower hierarchy with branching parabolic connectors.
viewHints.ideas: Timeline with ideas plotted along a swooping parabolic curve, each as a starburst node.
viewHints.ai-chat: Space-radio transmission format with callsign headers, signal-wave decorators, and capsule-shaped message bubbles.
viewHints.settings: Control panel dashboard with googie-styled switch panels and angled section dividers.

antiRepeat: Pass 1 used diner/jukebox aesthetic with pink+mint — use space-age/googie with turquoise+coral instead
Pass 1 used speedometer gauges for dashboard — use mission-control panels instead
Pass 1 used jukebox flip transitions — use parabolic arc transitions instead
Pass 1 used diner speech bubble chat — use space-radio transmission format instead

passVariants.direction: Drive-in movie theater at night. The UI evokes the magic of a 1950s outdoor cinema — deep purple sky, neon yellow marquee lights, warm projection glow on white screens. Film strip dividers, marquee lettering with chaser lights, ticket-stub shaped cards, and a cinematic projection-glow effect on content panels. Everything has that warm nighttime-at-the-movies atmosphere.

buttonHover.prompt: Dotted border lights chase around the button perimeter like a movie marquee

buttonClick.prompt: A brief bright flash like a film projector lamp clicking on

cardHover.prompt: Card brightens as if a projector beam is focusing on it

pageTransition.prompt: View transitions with a film-strip sprocket-hole wipe effect

scrollReveal.prompt: Content fades in as if a spotlight is sweeping across the screen

navItemHover.prompt: A chaser-light underline animates under the nav item

navItemActive.prompt: Active item gets a NOW SHOWING marquee badge

inputFocus.prompt: Input border glows neon yellow like a marquee sign

toggleSwitch.prompt: Toggle clicks like a projector power switch

tooltips.prompt: Tooltip appears shaped like a perforated ticket stub

loadingState.prompt: Loading shown as a classic film countdown leader: 5, 4, 3, 2, 1

idleAmbient.prompt: Subtle floating dust particles in a projector beam cone

microFeedback.prompt: A yellow star pops up and sparkles on success

viewHints.dashboard: Movie marquee header with chaser lights, stat cards shaped like ticket stubs, and a film-strip divider between sections.
viewHints.projects: Now-showing/coming-soon split with current projects on the big screen and upcoming ones on poster cards.
viewHints.project-workspace: Widescreen cinematic layout with dark sidebars like theater curtains framing a bright content screen.
viewHints.kanban: Vertical columns styled as movie-theater aisles with ticket-stub cards and marquee column headers.
viewHints.whiteboard: Storyboard canvas with film-frame cells arranged in cinematic sequences with scene numbers.
viewHints.schema-planner: Film credits format with entities as cast lists and relationships as crew credits.
viewHints.directory-tree: Movie credits scroll format with hierarchical indentation and category headers.
viewHints.ideas: Pinterest masonry styled as a wall of movie posters — each idea as a poster with title, tagline, and genre badge.
viewHints.ai-chat: Comic panel layout with dramatic speech bubbles, film-grain texture, and dramatic lighting effects on messages.
viewHints.settings: Projection-room control panel with large labeled switches, dial controls, and grouped equipment sections.

antiRepeat: Pass 1 used light pastel pink+mint palette — use dark purple+neon yellow nighttime palette instead
Pass 1 used diner jukebox transitions — use film reel/projector transitions instead
Pass 2 used space-age googie with turquoise+coral — use cinematic marquee with purple+yellow instead
Pass 2 used atomic orbit animations — use marquee chaser lights and projector effects instead
Pass 1 used diner speech bubble chat and pass 2 used space-radio chat — use comic panel chat instead

passVariants.direction: Soda fountain pharmacy aesthetic. The UI channels a 1950s corner drugstore with a soda fountain counter. Powder blue and cherry red on cream, striped awning patterns, soda glass silhouette shapes, counter-stool tab navigation, and receipt-paper style lists. Everything feels cheerful, clean, and wholesome — like a Norman Rockwell painting of a soda shop counter.

buttonHover.prompt: Button fills with a candy-stripe pattern on hover

buttonClick.prompt: Tiny bubbles fizz upward from the button on click

cardHover.prompt: Card lifts and rotates 1 degree like picking up a coaster

pageTransition.prompt: New view rolls down from the top like a receipt printing

scrollReveal.prompt: Content items slide in from the right one by one like items being placed on a counter

navItemHover.prompt: Nav item icon spins like a counter stool rotating

navItemActive.prompt: Active item gets a cherry-red circular dot marker

inputFocus.prompt: Input border takes on a powder-blue tint

toggleSwitch.prompt: Toggle animates like pulling a soda fountain tap handle

tooltips.prompt: Tooltip appears as a small recipe card with a decorative border

loadingState.prompt: Loading shown as bubbles rising through a soda straw

microFeedback.prompt: A small cherry icon pops up on success

viewHints.dashboard: Soda fountain counter layout with metric cards as drink menu specials on a chalkboard, and daily stats on receipt paper.
viewHints.projects: Menu board grid with projects as daily specials — each with a price-tag-style status badge and striped border.
viewHints.project-workspace: Counter service layout with a long horizontal workspace and stool-tab navigation along the top edge.
viewHints.kanban: Vertical columns styled as ingredient shelves with cards as recipe cards, each with a decorative border.
viewHints.whiteboard: Chalkboard canvas with chalk-style drawings, eraser smudge effects, and hand-lettered labels.
viewHints.schema-planner: Recipe-ingredient-list format with entities as recipes and fields as ingredients with measurement annotations.
viewHints.directory-tree: Menu hierarchy with categories as section headers and items with price-dot-leaders to metadata.
viewHints.ideas: List view styled as a receipt/order pad — each idea is a line item with checkboxes and running totals.
viewHints.ai-chat: Letter/note format with messages styled as handwritten notes on napkins — cursive-adjacent font, cream background.
viewHints.settings: Control panel styled as a soda fountain machine with labeled taps, gauges, and grouped controls.

antiRepeat: Pass 1 used pink+mint neon diner palette — use powder blue+cherry red on cream instead
Pass 1 used jukebox selector navigation — use counter-stool tab navigation instead
Pass 2 used space-age googie with boomerang shapes — use soda fountain with awning stripes instead
Pass 3 used dark purple nighttime cinema palette — use light cheerful soda shop palette instead
Pass 3 used film-reel transitions — use receipt-roll and fizz-bubble transitions instead
Pass 3 used comic panel chat — use handwritten napkin-note chat instead

styles.label: Liquid Motion
styles.notes: Everything slides, morphs, flows. The motion IS the design. Clean modern aesthetic underneath but every interaction feels like touching water. Blob nav, morphing panels, wave transitions, ripple feedback. GSAP is essential here.

passVariants.direction: Blob-surface layout. Navigation items are organic blob shapes that morph on hover. Content panels have fluid, animated border-radius that subtly shifts. Page transitions are liquid dissolves. Scroll behavior has momentum-based parallax. Color is clean blue-to-purple gradient spectrum with white surfaces. GSAP morphSVG or CSS clip-path animations for panel transitions. The whole UI breathes.

buttonHover.prompt: Button shape morphs into an organic blob form on hover

buttonClick.prompt: Liquid ripple emanates from center of button outward

cardHover.prompt: Card border-radius animates organically as if the card is breathing

pageTransition.prompt: Current view dissolves into liquid blobs that reform into the new view

scrollReveal.prompt: Content bubbles up from below viewport as blob shapes that settle into rectangles

navItemHover.prompt: An organic blob shape morphs behind the nav item on hover

navItemActive.prompt: Active item has a filled blob shape pulsing gently behind it

inputFocus.prompt: Input border pulses with a blue glow like breathing

toggleSwitch.prompt: Toggle thumb stretches elastically while sliding

tooltips.prompt: Tooltip morphs into view as an organic blob shape

loadingState.prompt: Loading shown as a blob that continuously morphs between shapes

idleAmbient.prompt: Large soft gradient blobs drift slowly in the background

microFeedback.prompt: A blob shape pops and dissolves on success

viewHints.dashboard: Stat cards with morphing blob borders, radial charts with liquid fill animations, gradient backgrounds that shift subtly.
viewHints.projects: Blob-shaped project cards that morph on hover, arranged in a flowing grid with organic spacing.
viewHints.project-workspace: Split panels with blob-shaped divider that morphs when dragged.
viewHints.kanban: Vertical columns with flowing blob headers, cards that have breathing border-radius.
viewHints.whiteboard: Free canvas where nodes are blob shapes connected by liquid curved paths.
viewHints.schema-planner: Entity blobs connected by flowing liquid relationship lines that animate on hover.
viewHints.directory-tree: Organic tree with blob nodes and fluid curved connectors instead of straight lines.
viewHints.ideas: Bubble chart with blob-shaped idea bubbles that morph and pulse based on priority.
viewHints.ai-chat: Chat bubbles with organic blob shapes that morph as messages appear, liquid typing indicator.
viewHints.settings: Single scroll with blob-shaped section backgrounds that morph as you scroll through them.

passVariants.direction: Wave/current layout. The app flows like a river. Navigation is a horizontal stream with items that float and bob subtly. Content panels slide in from the side like currents merging. Scroll creates a wave effect where content rises from below. SVG wave dividers between sections. Color is deep ocean blue fading to surface foam white. Every button press sends a ripple animation. GSAP ScrollTrigger for current-like scroll behavior.

buttonHover.prompt: A wave ripple effect crosses the button surface on hover

buttonClick.prompt: Ripple radiates outward from the exact click point like a stone hitting water

cardHover.prompt: Card bobs upward slightly as if floating on a wave

pageTransition.prompt: A wave sweeps horizontally across the screen revealing the new view

scrollReveal.prompt: Content rises up on a wave crest from below the viewport

navItemHover.prompt: Nav item bobs upward as if floating to the surface

navItemActive.prompt: A flowing animated underline moves like a water current

inputFocus.prompt: Border ripple expands outward from the focus point

toggleSwitch.prompt: Toggle thumb slides with a liquid wave trailing behind it

tooltips.prompt: Tooltip rises up like an air bubble from underwater

loadingState.prompt: Loading bar oscillates like an ocean wave

idleAmbient.prompt: Subtle wave animation on section dividers as if the surface is gently undulating

microFeedback.prompt: A circular splash ripple expands outward on success

viewHints.dashboard: Deep ocean dashboard with wave-divider sections, metrics that bob like buoys, and depth-layered background gradients.
viewHints.projects: Horizontal stream layout with projects floating as cards in a current, sorted by flow priority.
viewHints.project-workspace: Tidal-zone layout with content panels that slide in from sides like merging currents.
viewHints.kanban: Horizontal swimlanes that literally flow — cards drift within lane currents with subtle animation.
viewHints.whiteboard: Ocean surface canvas with nodes as floating objects connected by current-flow arrows.
viewHints.schema-planner: Underwater diagram with entities at different depth layers connected by flowing relation lines.
viewHints.directory-tree: River-delta tree with branching streams for each directory level.
viewHints.ideas: Card grid with wave-animated borders, cards floating at different z-depths with parallax scroll.
viewHints.ai-chat: Deep-sea transmission format with sonar-ping styling, bubble-rise message animations, and depth-pressure indicators.
viewHints.settings: Tabbed form with wave-transition tab switching and deep-ocean themed control groups.

antiRepeat: Pass 1 used light blue-purple palette on white — use deep ocean dark palette instead
Pass 1 used blob morphing as primary motion — use wave/current/ripple motion instead
Pass 1 used bubble chart for ideas — use parallax floating card grid instead
Pass 1 used blob-shape chat bubbles — use sonar/deep-sea transmission format instead

passVariants.direction: Mercury/metallic liquid aesthetic. The UI channels liquid metal — chrome reflections, mercury droplet shapes, and metallic sheen on every surface. Silver gradients on dark charcoal with electric violet accents. Surfaces look like polished chrome catching light. Interactions feel magnetic — elements snap into place with metallic weight. Mercury droplets merge and split for transitions.

buttonHover.prompt: A chrome highlight reflection slides across the button surface on hover

buttonClick.prompt: Button snaps down with magnetic weight then bounces back with metallic inertia

cardHover.prompt: A metallic sheen sweeps across the card surface like light on liquid mercury

pageTransition.prompt: Current view splits into mercury droplets that flow and reform into the new view

scrollReveal.prompt: Content forms as mercury droplets that coalesce into solid shapes as they enter viewport

navItemHover.prompt: Chrome light sweep across the nav item text

navItemActive.prompt: Active item has an electric violet glow indicator bar

inputFocus.prompt: Input border gains a metallic shine effect on focus

toggleSwitch.prompt: Toggle thumb slides as a mercury blob that deforms during motion

tooltips.prompt: Tooltip appears as a chrome-finished bubble with metallic reflection

loadingState.prompt: Loading bar fills with liquid mercury flow animation

idleAmbient.prompt: Subtle chrome light reflections drift across surfaces

microFeedback.prompt: A metallic flash with a chrome highlight confirms success

viewHints.dashboard: Data tables with chrome header bars and mercury-fill progress indicators. Metric gauges with metallic bezels and violet accent numbers.
viewHints.projects: List view with chrome-divider rows and metallic status badges that catch light on hover.
viewHints.project-workspace: Chrome-framed panels with metallic dividers and a mercury-flow resize handle.
viewHints.kanban: Vertical columns with chrome column headers and cards with metallic surface sheen.
viewHints.whiteboard: Dark canvas with chrome-outlined nodes and electric violet connector lines with magnetic snap behavior.
viewHints.schema-planner: Chrome-framed entity panels connected by mercury-flow relationship lines with metallic junction dots.
viewHints.directory-tree: Metallic tree with chrome connecting lines and mercury-dot expand/collapse markers.
viewHints.ideas: List view with chrome-bordered idea entries, each with a metallic priority bar and violet category tags.
viewHints.ai-chat: Terminal-sleek format with chrome message frames, metallic sender badges, and mercury typing indicator.
viewHints.settings: Control panel with chrome-bezeled controls, metallic toggle switches, and grouped settings in chrome-bordered sections.

antiRepeat: Pass 1 used light blue-purple blobs on white — use dark charcoal with silver metallic instead
Pass 1 used organic blob morphing — use mercury metallic droplet motion instead
Pass 2 used deep ocean blue water theme — use chrome/mercury metallic theme instead
Pass 2 used wave/current animations — use magnetic snap and chrome sweep instead
Pass 2 used sonar chat format — use terminal-sleek chrome format instead

passVariants.direction: Watercolor wash aesthetic. The UI is soft, artistic, and painterly. Soft pastel washes of blush pink, sage green, and lavender bleed into each other on a white canvas. Color transitions are gradual and imperfect — like watercolor bleeding at the edges. Gaussian blur layers create depth. Paintbrush-stroke dividers replace hard lines. Everything feels hand-painted, gentle, and organic in an artistic rather than geometric way.

buttonHover.prompt: Button fills with a watercolor wash that bleeds slightly beyond the borders

buttonClick.prompt: A tiny paint splatter radiates from the click point

cardHover.prompt: Card border softens into a watercolor bleed effect on hover

pageTransition.prompt: New view washes in like watercolor bleeding across wet paper

scrollReveal.prompt: Content is revealed behind a paintbrush stroke that sweeps across

navItemHover.prompt: A soft watercolor wash highlight appears behind the nav item

navItemActive.prompt: Active item has a watercolor paint dot beside it

inputFocus.prompt: Input border gains a soft blush glow with gaussian blur

toggleSwitch.prompt: Toggle slides with a soft, slow easing and pastel color change

tooltips.prompt: Tooltip appears as a soft cloud shape with blurred edges

loadingState.prompt: Loading shown as watercolor paint slowly dripping and filling a container

idleAmbient.prompt: Background pastel washes slowly drift and blend into each other

microFeedback.prompt: A small painted petal shape floats away on success

viewHints.dashboard: Watercolor-washed stat panels with soft gradient backgrounds that bleed into each other. Metrics in elegant serif type over pastel washes.
viewHints.projects: Gallery grid with each project card having a unique pastel watercolor header wash. Soft drop shadows with gaussian blur.
viewHints.project-workspace: Canvas layout with paintbrush-stroke dividers and soft pastel section backgrounds that blend at edges.
viewHints.kanban: Vertical columns with watercolor-wash column headers, each a different pastel. Cards have soft, blurred edges.
viewHints.whiteboard: Watercolor canvas with paint-splatter nodes and brushstroke connectors in varied pastel hues.
viewHints.schema-planner: Soft diagram with entities as watercolor-washed panels connected by thin painted lines.
viewHints.directory-tree: Painted tree with brushstroke branch lines and watercolor-dot leaf nodes.
viewHints.ideas: Masonry grid with watercolor-washed cards, each with a unique blend of two pastel colors bleeding into each other.
viewHints.ai-chat: Handwritten letter format with messages on watercolor-washed paper, elegant serif typography, and paintbrush-stroke message dividers.
viewHints.settings: Single scroll with watercolor section backgrounds that transition softly between hues. Controls have soft rounded styling.

antiRepeat: Pass 1 used blue-purple blob morphing on white — use soft pastel watercolor washes instead
Pass 2 used deep ocean dark theme with waves — use light watercolor white canvas instead
Pass 3 used dark chrome/mercury metallic — use soft pastel painterly aesthetic instead
Pass 3 used magnetic snap interactions — use soft bleed and paint-stroke interactions instead
Pass 3 used terminal-sleek chrome chat — use handwritten letter watercolor chat instead

styles.label: Slate
styles.notes: Dark stone, carved interfaces. Think luxury watch UI meets mountain lodge. Layered slate textures, etched typography, chiseled borders. Muted earth tones with one warm amber accent. Dense, premium, weighty. No playfulness.

passVariants.direction: Carved-stone console layout. The UI feels etched into dark slate. Navigation is a left rail with items that look recessed and engraved. Content panels have subtle inner shadows that create depth like carved-out areas. Typography uses letter-spacing and thin weights to feel etched. Color is charcoal, graphite, and warm amber for active states. Borders are subtle stone-texture-gradient via CSS. Premium and heavy.

buttonHover.prompt: Button shadow deepens as if being pressed deeper into stone

buttonClick.prompt: Button sinks with a heavy, weighted feel like chiseling into rock

cardHover.prompt: A subtle amber light appears at the card edges as if light is catching the carved stone rim

pageTransition.prompt: Views slide with heavy, slow momentum as if stone slabs being pushed

scrollReveal.prompt: Content fades in with a slow, heavy feel — no bouncing, just weight

navItemHover.prompt: Warm amber glow at the edges of the nav item

navItemActive.prompt: Active item has an amber highlight bar that looks carved into the rail

inputFocus.prompt: Focus adds a warm amber inner glow to the input

toggleSwitch.prompt: Toggle slides with heavy resistance like a stone lever

tooltips.prompt: Tooltip appears as a chipped-stone fragment with inner shadow

loadingState.prompt: Loading bar fills slowly with warm amber — deliberate pace

microFeedback.prompt: Warm amber pulse confirms success

viewHints.dashboard: Stat cards with deep inner shadows looking carved into slate. Amber accent on key metrics. Dense data table below with stone-colored alternating rows.
viewHints.projects: Engraved list with heavy horizontal dividers. Project names in spaced-out thin typography. Status shown as amber/green/neutral stone badges.
viewHints.project-workspace: Left-rail navigation carved into slate, main content area as a lighter stone surface with inner shadow edges.
viewHints.kanban: Vertical columns with stone-carved column headers and cards with chiseled borders and inner shadows.
viewHints.whiteboard: Dark canvas with node shapes that look etched into stone, connected by thin amber lines.
viewHints.schema-planner: Stone tablet layout with entities as carved panels and relationship lines as etched grooves.
viewHints.directory-tree: Engraved tree with thin connecting lines and amber folder indicators.
viewHints.ideas: Card grid with each card as a carved stone tile — inner shadows, etched titles, amber accent on hover.
viewHints.ai-chat: Engraved message blocks with recessed text areas. AI messages in slightly lighter stone, user in darker.
viewHints.settings: Tabbed form with stone-carved tab indicators and grouped settings in recessed panels.

passVariants.direction: Geological strata layout. Content is layered like sedimentary rock — each section sits at a different visual depth with CSS box-shadows creating a stacked-stone effect. Navigation is a top bar with tab items that look like protruding stone tablets. Scroll reveals layers. Color shifts from deep charcoal at the base to lighter slate at the top. One warm gold accent for active and focus states. Dense information display with small type and tight grid.

buttonHover.prompt: Button lifts to a higher strata layer with deeper shadow beneath

buttonClick.prompt: Button sinks into its current strata layer

cardHover.prompt: Card shifts upward one geological layer with corresponding shadow change

pageTransition.prompt: Current view peels away like a geological layer revealing the view beneath

scrollReveal.prompt: Content stacks into view layer by layer from bottom to top

navItemHover.prompt: Nav tab protrudes further from the bar like a stone tablet being pushed out

navItemActive.prompt: Active tab has a gold-vein line underneath like a mineral deposit

inputFocus.prompt: Input edges glow with gold like a mineral vein exposed

toggleSwitch.prompt: Toggle slides with a tectonic shift feel — slow start, quick snap

tooltips.prompt: Tooltip appears as a raised stratum layer with depth shadow

loadingState.prompt: Loading fills from bottom to top like sediment layers depositing

microFeedback.prompt: A gold vein flash across the element confirms success

viewHints.dashboard: Layered strata dashboard with metrics at different elevation depths. Top layer shows summary, deeper layers show detail. Gold accent on key numbers.
viewHints.projects: Stratified list with projects grouped by depth/priority layer. Each layer has a different shade of slate.
viewHints.project-workspace: Top-bar tablet navigation with strata-depth content layers that parallax-scroll at different rates.
viewHints.kanban: Vertical columns at different strata depths. Higher priority columns protrude more. Cards stack within layers.
viewHints.whiteboard: Multi-depth canvas with nodes at different z-layers connected by gold-vein connector lines.
viewHints.schema-planner: Layered diagram with entities at different geological depths, relationships shown as veins between strata.
viewHints.directory-tree: Depth-layered tree where each indent level is a deeper stratum, with gold connecting veins.
viewHints.ideas: Timeline strip with ideas as geological samples along a cross-section view, dated by strata layer.
viewHints.ai-chat: Depth-layered chat where older messages sink deeper into darker strata, recent ones float at the surface.
viewHints.settings: Single scroll with sections at different strata depths, controls recessed into their respective layers.

antiRepeat: Pass 1 used left-rail carved console navigation — use top-bar stone-tablet navigation instead
Pass 1 used engraved inner-shadow aesthetic — use layered strata depth-shadow aesthetic instead
Pass 1 used card grid for ideas — use timeline strip cross-section instead
Pass 1 used tabbed settings — use single scroll strata-depth settings instead

passVariants.direction: Obsidian volcanic glass aesthetic. Pure black surfaces with glass-like reflections, volcanic crack patterns revealing molten red and ember orange beneath. The UI looks like polished obsidian with magma visible through the cracks. Active states glow with ember heat. Mirror-like reflections on glass surfaces. Volcanic crack patterns as decorative borders and dividers. Everything is intensely dark with moments of fiery brilliance.

buttonHover.prompt: Volcanic crack patterns on the button glow with ember orange on hover

buttonClick.prompt: A pulse of molten red emanates from the button on click

cardHover.prompt: A glass-like reflection slides across the card surface following cursor movement

pageTransition.prompt: Current view cracks like obsidian and falls away revealing the new view beneath

scrollReveal.prompt: Content rises with a subtle ember glow fading in from below

navItemHover.prompt: Volcanic crack pattern appears around the nav item with ember glow

navItemActive.prompt: Active item has a glowing molten-red underline

inputFocus.prompt: Input border glows ember orange like heated obsidian edges

toggleSwitch.prompt: Toggle thumb slides with a lava-flow trail that cools behind it

tooltips.prompt: Tooltip appears as a sharp obsidian shard with glass reflections

loadingState.prompt: Loading bar fills with flowing magma animation

idleAmbient.prompt: Volcanic crack patterns subtly pulse with ember glow

microFeedback.prompt: A bright ember flare confirms success

viewHints.dashboard: Obsidian mirror dashboard with metric cards that have glass reflections. Key stats glow ember red. Volcanic crack dividers between sections.
viewHints.projects: Dark glass list with each row reflecting light on hover. Status indicators are ember/magma glow dots.
viewHints.project-workspace: Obsidian-framed workspace with volcanic crack patterns on panel dividers and ember glow on active areas.
viewHints.kanban: Vertical columns on pure black with volcanic crack column headers. Cards are obsidian shards with glass reflections.
viewHints.whiteboard: Dark glass canvas with nodes that have obsidian mirror surfaces, connected by molten-red flowing lines.
viewHints.schema-planner: Volcanic diagram with entity panels showing crack patterns and relationship lines as magma veins.
viewHints.directory-tree: Obsidian tree with molten-red connecting lines and ember-glow expand/collapse indicators.
viewHints.ideas: Card grid on pure black. Each card is a polished obsidian tile with glass reflection and ember category glow.
viewHints.ai-chat: Forge communication format — messages appear as heated text cooling from red to white. AI has ember glow, user has cooled obsidian.
viewHints.settings: Control panel with obsidian switch housings, ember-glow active states, and volcanic crack section dividers.

antiRepeat: Pass 1 used charcoal+amber carved console — use pure black+molten red obsidian glass instead
Pass 1 used inner-shadow carved aesthetic — use glass-reflection and volcanic-crack aesthetic instead
Pass 2 used layered strata with gold veins — use obsidian glass with magma cracks instead
Pass 2 used geological strata depth — use volcanic glass mirror surface instead
Pass 2 used timeline strip ideas — use obsidian tile card grid instead

passVariants.direction: Sandstone desert mesa aesthetic. Warm, weathered, and ancient. The UI channels desert landscapes — warm sand tones, terracotta accents, sage vegetation touches. Surfaces look weathered by wind erosion with rough edges and organic shapes. Canyon-layer depth effects create visual hierarchy. Dried-earth texture patterns and wind-worn typography. Everything feels sun-baked, timeless, and naturally formed rather than constructed.

buttonHover.prompt: Button surface reveals a sandstone texture pattern on hover

buttonClick.prompt: A tiny dust cloud puffs from the button on click

cardHover.prompt: Card shadow deepens and warms as if the sun is casting a canyon shadow

pageTransition.prompt: Current view erodes away like sandstone in wind revealing the new view

scrollReveal.prompt: Content rises slowly from below as if mesa formations emerging from a canyon

navItemHover.prompt: A warm sandy highlight appears behind the nav item

navItemActive.prompt: Active item has a terracotta-colored indicator bar

inputFocus.prompt: Input border warms to terracotta on focus

toggleSwitch.prompt: Toggle thumb slides with a subtle dust trail behind it

tooltips.prompt: Tooltip appears as a weathered park-sign plaque

loadingState.prompt: Loading shown as sand flowing through an hourglass shape

idleAmbient.prompt: Very subtle heat shimmer effect on surface edges

microFeedback.prompt: A sage-green checkmark fades in and out on success

viewHints.dashboard: Mesa overview with stat cards as sandstone formations at different heights. Terracotta accent on key metrics. Dried-earth dividers between sections.
viewHints.projects: Trail map layout with projects as waypoints along a winding path. Each waypoint has elevation and distance metadata.
viewHints.project-workspace: Canyon layout with a main content valley and sidebar cliffs. Weathered edges on panel borders.
viewHints.kanban: Horizontal swimlanes styled as canyon layers at different depths. Cards are sandstone blocks with weathered edges.
viewHints.whiteboard: Desert canvas with sandstone nodes and dried-riverbed connector paths between them.
viewHints.schema-planner: Geological survey diagram with entities as rock formation samples and relationships as fault lines.
viewHints.directory-tree: Canyon-rim hierarchy with branching trails for each level, terracotta markers for folders.
viewHints.ideas: Pinterest masonry with sandstone-textured cards at varying heights like mesa formations.
viewHints.ai-chat: Park ranger dispatch format — messages styled as field notes with location stamps and handwritten-style observations.
viewHints.settings: Wizard steps presented as a trail guide — each step is a trail marker with numbered waypoints and terrain descriptions.

antiRepeat: Pass 1 used dark charcoal carved interior — use warm sand outdoor landscape instead
Pass 2 used dark layered strata underground — use warm sunlit mesa surface instead
Pass 3 used pure black obsidian with fire/magma — use warm sandstone with sage/terracotta instead
Pass 3 used glass reflections and volcanic cracks — use weathered erosion and canyon depth instead
Pass 3 used forge communication chat — use park ranger field notes chat instead
